basicDetails.schemeName: Distribution of Seeds of more productions varieties/ Hybrids varieties Seeds and fertilizer at subsidies etc. to Adivasi farmers in Tribal Area: Water Carrying Pipe Line (TASP & OTASP) Gujarat

nodalDepartmentName.label: Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme "Distribution of Seeds of more productive varieties / Hybrid varieties Seeds and fertilizer at subsidies, etc. to Adivasi farmers in Tribal Area (TASP)" with a component "Water Carrying Pipe Line (TASP & OTASP)" is introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Co-operation Department, Government of Gujarat, aims to improve agricultural productivity and livelihood opportunities of Scheduled Tribe farmers. Through this scheme, assistance is provided for various components, including Water Carrying Pipe Line (TASP & OTASP) and other recommended practices are provided to Scheduled Tribe farmers.
schemeContent.benefits_md:
1. The assistance provided is 75% of the purchase price or ₹ 22,500/- per beneficiary, whichever is less.
> **Remark:** As per conditions No. 5, 16, 17, 19 and 22 of [Appendix-1](https://mariyojana.gujarat.gov.in/Schemeatoz.aspx). (Refer Scheme No. 35) > **Frequency:** Once in 5 Years.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to improve the agricultural productivity of Scheduled Tribe farmers through subsidized seeds, fertilizers, and equipment. It provides direct support to tribal farmers for enhancing crop production and livelihood.

children.text: The scheme "Distribution of Seeds of more productive varieties / Hybrid varieties Seeds and fertilizer at subsidies, etc. to Adivasi farmers in Tribal Area (TASP)" with a component "Water Carrying Pipe Line (TASP & OTASP)" is introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Co-operation Department, Government of Gujarat, aims to improve agricultural productivity and livelihood opportunities of Scheduled Tribe farmers. Through this scheme, assistance is provided for various components, including Water Carrying Pipe Line (TASP & OTASP) and other recommended practices are provided to Scheduled Tribe farmers.
The assistance provided is 75% of the purchase price or ₹ 22,500/- per beneficiary, whichever is less.
As per conditions No. 5, 16, 17, 19 and 22 of
The applicant may visit and apply online at the
Click on 'Login' from the top right-hand side, then click on "Beneficiary Registration" and select any one from the 'Farmer' or 'Institutional' or 'Except For the Farmer' as the Beneficiary Type.

Enter the 'Company Name' and Address if you have selected 'Institutional' or 'Except For the Farmer' as the Beneficiary Type. And for all select the District, Taluka, and Village, choose 'what type of account holder you are?', enter your Account Number and Name, solve the Captcha, and click 'Save and Next'.
Enter your Mobile Number and E-mail address, click 'Send OTP', enter the received OTP, create and confirm a Password, solve the Captcha, and click 'Submit'.
The applicant may visit and apply online at the
Click on 'Login' from the top right-hand side of the homepage. On the home page, click on ‘Schemes’ and then click on ‘Agricultural Schemes’.
Now select the scheme, click on the ‘Apply’ button, and an application page will open.
Click on the "Apply New" button and submit a new application.
Click on the "Update Application" button to add corrections to the application.
Once the application is done, confirm it.
Take a printout of the confirmed application.

applicationProcess.process_md:
> **Registration Process:** **Step 1:** The applicant may visit and apply online at the [I-Khedut Portal](https://ikhedut.gujarat.gov.in/). **Step 2:** Click on 'Login' from the top right-hand side, then click on "Beneficiary Registration" and select any one from the 'Farmer' or 'Institutional' or 'Except For the Farmer' as the Beneficiary Type. **Step 3:** Enter the 'Company Name' and Address if you have selected 'Institutional' or 'Except For the Farmer' as the Beneficiary Type. And for all select the District, Taluka, and Village, choose 'what type of account holder you are?', enter your Account Number and Name, solve the Captcha, and click 'Save and Next'. **Step 4:** Enter your Mobile Number and E-mail address, click 'Send OTP', enter the received OTP, create and confirm a Password, solve the Captcha, and click 'Submit'.
> **Login Process:** **Step 1:** The applicant may visit and apply online at the [I-Khedut Portal](https://ikhedut.gujarat.gov.in/). **Step 2:** Click on 'Login' from the top right-hand side of the homepage. On the home page, click on ‘Schemes’ and then click on ‘Agricultural Schemes’. **Step 3:** Now select the scheme, click on the ‘Apply’ button, and an application page will open. **Step 4:** Click on the "Apply New" button and submit a new application. **Step 5:** Click on the "Update Application" button to add corrections to the application. **Step 6:** Once the application is done, confirm it. **Step 7:** Take a printout of the confirmed application.
> **Contact Us:** [**Click here**](https://ikhedut.gujarat.gov.in/Public/frm_Public_Contacts.aspx)**.**

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The applicant should belong to a Scheduled Tribe. 1. The applicant should be a farmer. 1. The applicant should be located in tribal areas OR be a tribal cultivator residing outside tribal areas. 1. The scheme excludes farmers from Dang district.

children.text: The applicant should belong to a Scheduled Tribe.
The applicant should be a farmer.
The applicant should be located in tribal areas OR be a tribal cultivator residing outside tribal areas.
The scheme excludes farmers from Dang district.
